_meta.purpose: CR 2026-06-26 (FROZEN-DEBT governance demo): a payment-link request must qualify to be created — >=1 student and a positive unit price. This central fact is AUTHORED here in the catalog, NOT typed into the frozen finance/payment-link route; the route grows ONE thin call to the compiled checker (CLAUDE.md FROZEN-DEBT rule #1).

then.else_reason: A payment link needs at least 1 student and a positive unit price.
